query:
SELECT
                ra.member_id,
                r.id           AS role_id,
                r.name         AS role_name,
                COALESCE(r.color, 0) AS "color!: i32",
                r.position
            FROM role_assignments ra
            JOIN roles r ON r.id = ra.role_id
            WHERE ra.member_id = ANY($1)
            ORDER BY r.position ASC
